custom_css: /* Force collection images to be square */.collection-list img {width: 80%; /* controls size relative to container */ aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; /* force square (1:1 ratio) */ object-fit: cover; /* crop to fill the square without stretching */ border-radius: 20px; /* keep rounded corners */ margin: 0 auto;}
collection_list_6h3xtg.name: t:sections.collection-list.presets.name
